project_name.description: The Gothic project name; used as a base for all resource names.

suffix.description: Deterministic resource suffix derived from the Go module name.

region.description: The AWS region to deploy into.

profile.description: The AWS shared-config profile to use.

server_memory.description: Lambda function memory size in MB.

ecr_image_uri.description: The full ECR image URI (including tag) for the Lambda container image. Supplied at apply time via gothic_image.auto.tfvars.json once the image is built+pushed; defaults to empty so init/validate/destroy don't require it.

bucket_name.description: The S3 bucket name for static assets.

state_bucket.description: The S3 bucket holding the OpenTofu remote state.

lock_table.description: The DynamoDB table used for OpenTofu state locking.

enable_custom_domain.description: Whether this stage serves a custom domain. It switches CloudFront to the custom aliases + ACM viewer certificate (either the managed cert this stack creates, or a BYO local.certificate_arn). local.custom_domain is resolved from raw/SSM/Secrets.

enable_managed_cert.description: Whether Gothic creates + DNS-validates the ACM certificate itself (CustomDomain + HostedZoneId set, no BYO CertificateArn). The certificate is created in us-east-1 via the aws.us_east_1 provider alias so it works regardless of the stack's region; when false and a custom domain is served, local.certificate_arn (a BYO cert) is used instead.

enable_route53.description: Whether to create the Route53 alias A record (custom domain served AND a HostedZoneId provided). DNS managed outside AWS leaves this false while enable_custom_domain stays true.

enable_waf.description: Whether this stage declares a WAFv2 Web ACL ARN. It gates the count of the WAF association; the ARN VALUE is resolved into local.waf_arn.
